commit.message:
fix: handle Pydantic 422 array errors in parseApiError

Pydantic validation errors return detail as an array of objects,
not a string. Passing this array directly to toast.error() caused
a React rendering crash (global error boundary). Now properly
extracts msg from each validation error and joins them.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Initial release: unified-channel v0.1.0

Unified message middleware for Python with 19 channel adapters:
Telegram, Discord, Slack, WhatsApp, iMessage, LINE, Matrix,
MS Teams, Feishu, Mattermost, Google Chat, Twitch, IRC, Nostr,
Zalo, BlueBubbles, Nextcloud Talk, Synology Chat.

Features:
- ChannelManager orchestrates adapters + middleware pipeline
- CommandMiddleware for /command routing with decorator API
- AccessMiddleware for sender allowlist
- Custom middleware support (rate limiting, logging, etc.)
- Push messaging + broadcast across channels
- All adapters use lazy imports (install only what you need)
- Zero core dependencies, Python 3.10+

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: unified-channel

commit.message:
Fix BUG-21 (v2): exclude intercom senders from thread routing in resolveReplyThread

Relay notifications from @*-intercom:a-gis.org accounts (e.g. '⛔ !refresh
Cid — fetch failed') match TRIGGER_PATTERN because they contain 'Cid', but
are NOT user addresses. Adding isRoutableHuman() check excludes intercom
senders from thread routing. Only operators (@operator:a-gis.org) and humans
can trigger thread routing via direct callouts.

commit.message:
fix(auth): resolve F5 AuthSessionMissingError — 3 root causes

1. middleware.ts: set httpOnly:false on refreshed cookies
   Supabase SSR middleware writes httpOnly cookies by default when
   refreshing tokens. createBrowserClient reads via document.cookie
   and cannot see httpOnly cookies → INITIAL_SESSION = null on F5.
   Fix: spread options and override httpOnly:false so browser client
   always finds the session after any server-side token refresh.

2. auth-context.tsx: remove auth_resync_attempted flag before reload
   Flag was set BEFORE reload and only removed after a FAILED resync.
   If resync succeeded but the reload still showed null session,
   the flag blocked all future resync attempts until tab was closed.
   Fix: remove flag before calling window.location.reload() so any
   subsequent INITIAL_SESSION null can trigger a fresh resync.

3. auth-context.tsx: replace client-side signOut() with server route
   supabase.auth.signOut() client-side clears document.cookie tokens
   on PGRST116/inactive errors, causing zero cookies on next F5.
   Fix: redirect to /api/auth/signout (server-side, scope:global)
   which properly revokes the refresh token and sets expired cookies.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: add CORS middleware to daemon — fixes all TypeError: Failed to fetch

The Tauri WebView2 runs at origin http://tauri.localhost while the daemon
is at http://127.0.0.1:8080. Every fetch was being blocked by the browser
CORS policy because the daemon returned no Access-Control-Allow-Origin header.

Added cors_middleware to the aiohttp app that injects:
  Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *
  Access-Control-Allow-Methods: GET, POST, PATCH, DELETE, OPTIONS

on every response, including OPTIONS pre-flight requests.

Verified: 13/13 endpoints return HTTP 200 + CORS header.
Desktop app now receiving live data from all views.
Tests: 1304 passed, 1 skipped.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix false telecine detection on VHS tapes, bump version to 0.7.1

Scan type detection was misclassifying interlaced PAL VHS content as hard
telecine because any single repeated field (repeatedFields > 0) triggered
telecine. VHS tapes produce stray repeated fields from tracking instability,
especially at the start. Now requires >= 15% repeated fields ratio, matching
real 3:2 pulldown (~40%) while filtering out VHS noise. Also skips the first
2s of longer videos to avoid unstable VHS leader sections.

fix: correct API key column name for Payload's drizzle naming convention

Payload converts camelCase to snake_case treating each uppercase letter as a
word boundary. So enableAPIKey → enable_a_p_i_key (not enable_api_key).

Fixed:
- Users.ts: re-enable useAPIKey: true (reverts temp revert)
- 20260307_140000.ts: use enable_a_p_i_key column name
- Production DB: renamed enable_api_key → enable_a_p_i_key via psycopg2

Root cause: Payload's drizzle adapter camelCase conversion treats acronyms
letter-by-letter: A=_a, P=_p, I=_i. The DB column must match exactly.

commit.message:
Initial commit: Dental Article Auto-Generation System

Evidence-based pediatric dental article generator with:
- PubMed evidence search and management
- Structured article generation from topics.yaml
- Quality checking and validation
- 28 generated articles across 7 categories
  (infant, preschool, elementary, teen, orthodontics, pregnancy, general)
- CLI interface for batch generation

Migrated from sr-meta-analysis-tool branch claude/dental-article-automation-n10ct

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: handle large JSON responses that axios fails to auto-parse

The server returns valid 198KB JSON with base64 PDF content, but axios
doesn't auto-parse it (returns raw string). JSON.parse() also fails on
the large string. Added regex fallback to extract base64 PDF directly
from the response string: /"pdf":"([A-Za-z0-9+/=]+)"/

commit.message:
Fix infinite recursion in test suite caused by self-invoking tests

Two TDD tests (ac01_simplify_deletion, test_ac04_through_ac08) call
./test.sh from within the suite, causing infinite recursion and hanging.
Added BUILDCREW_TEST_RUNNING env guard to exit early on re-entry.

commit.message:
Fix 5 bugs: DCA sizing, silent API fails, whale direction, close guard, drawdown baseline

1. DCA: freeze originalAmount on first DCA entry so subsequent entries
   use correct base size instead of inflated cumulative amount
2. API: log warnings when Gamma API category fetches fail silently
   (was swallowing errors with catch(() => []))
3. Whale: clarify whale consensus comparison logic and improve log
   messages for whale-opposed signals
4. Close guard: add mutex flag to prevent concurrent checkAndCloseTrades
   calls from double-crediting capital
5. Monthly drawdown: cap new month baseline at previous startCapital to
   prevent inflation from unrealized gains

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add PIM resync with CRUD merge and edit mode for integrator config

- Product.remoteId tracks the source PIM record for stable identity across syncs
- ProviderConfig.idPath lets users specify which remote field to use as the ID
  (auto-detects id/_id/uuid/code when left blank)
- Sync route CRUD-merges incoming products against the existing snapshot:
  adds new, updates changed, removes deleted, keeps unchanged
- Returns sync stats (added/updated/removed/unchanged) in the response
- IntegratorClient gains a status view when a config already exists:
  shows active configuration details, last sync time, and a Resync button
- Edit configuration opens the wizard pre-populated with the saved config
- Cancel button in wizard returns to the status view without losing data

commit.message:
Add Reffo.ai search alongside DHT peers with source filter

Beacon search now queries both DHT peers and Reffo.ai in parallel,
ensuring users always see results even with zero peers connected.
Adds a 3-way source filter (All/Beacons/Reffo), source badges on
cards, and deduplication logic that prefers DHT results.
